name: starlabs-console-functions
description: StarLabs release-console backend (webhook mirror + console-gated PR/merge) — deploys to Firebase project starlabs-cicd.

scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions --project starlabs-cicd
scripts.shell: npm run build && firebase functions:shell --project starlabs-cicd
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions --project starlabs-cicd
